name: Ban
lore: Fox Sin of Greed. An undying human who takes what he wants — including your stats. Collab unit.

skills.description: Does ATK-scaled damage to all enemies with Lifesteal, recovering HP equal to 30% of the damage dealt.
Extorts ATK and DEF from all enemies. Extort lowers each enemy's ATK and DEF and adds the stolen points to Ban's own stats for the duration. Recasting refreshes — it never stacks.

ultimate.description: Does 600% ATK damage to one enemy and Extorts 50% of their ATK and DEF for 2 turns.

passive.name: Extort Life
passive.description: Whenever Ban ends a full round without taking damage, all enemies' max HP falls by 8% (max 5 stacks, uncancellable). Taking any damage — including DoT and counters — fully restores enemy max HP and resets the stacks. Teammates tagged [Human] gain +5% all stats in battle.
